title: lastrea wantotensis
intro: Lastrea wantotensis, also known as the Wantot fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antioxidant due to the presence of flavonoids and polyphenols. The health benefits of Lastrea wantotensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Lastrea wantotensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using a decoction, and are often used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
